D2 Vision L5 Evaluate Reference

CIEDE2000 Weighting

slide a test colour in L*a*b* and watch ΔE2000's weights bend the distance away from plain ΔE76

A straight distance in L*a*b* over-counts differences in saturated colours. CIEDE2000 divides each axis by a weight — S_L, S_C, S_H — plus a rotation term for blues.

The reference swatch is fixed; slide the test swatch's lightness, a*, and b*. Read both differences below — out in high chroma, ΔE2000 shrinks well under the raw ΔE76 the eye would over-report.
